title: Viking Homes
description: Village Datapack designed for use with dragon mods, but perfectly usable without them.
body:
**Completely fine to use in vanilla!**
Compatible with Terralith!

Adds viking villages.
![Town Hall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/906e17d6f85b1a6923c44ccbcd8b75a6f72cb7c9.png)

These are mostly based on how to train your dragon's Berk, but this can be used without such mods.

We ***might*** update to newer versions once the mods do.
